DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO MARTINEZ-VILLANUEVA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. NO APPEARANCES. THOSE WHO HAVE NOT MADE AN APPEARANCE ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED AND WILL BE GRANTED WITH SANCTIONS FOR DISCOVERY ABUSE TOTALING $500 FOR THIS AND THE TWO COMPANION MOTIONS AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT ROSENTHALL AND HIS COUNSEL OF RECORD. ONE ORDER ON THE THREE MOTIONS IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED AND WILL BE GRANTED WITH SANCTIONS FOR DISCOVERY ABUSE TOTALING $500 FOR THIS AND THE TWO COMPANION MOTIONS AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT ROSENTHALL AND HIS COUNSEL OF RECORD. ONE ORDER ON THE THREE MOTIONS IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-24-2019 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SIMON ROSENTHALL'S MOTION FOR QUASH OF SUMMONS FOR THE DEPOSITION SUBPOENA OF ALLA BOYKOFF, M.D. IS DENIED. THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED TO THE FOLLOWING EXTENT: THE DEPOSITION OF DR. BOYKOFF WILL BE LIMITED TO THE FOLLOWING TOPICS: (1) EDUCATION, TRAINING AND EXPERIENCE OF DR. BOYKOFF; (2) HEALTH CONDITIONS OF DEFENDANT ROSENTHALL, IF ANY, RELEVANT TO HIS ABILITY TO SAFELY DRIVE A PASSENGER VEHICLE AS OF THE DATE OF THE ACCIDENT INVOLVED IN THE PENDING ACTION; AND (3) HEALTH CONDITIONS PRESENTLY SUFFERED BY DEFENDANT ROSENTHALL, IF ANY, WHICH LIMIT OR PRECLUDE HIS ABILITY TO GIVE AN ORAL DEPOSITION NOW OR IN THE FORESEEABLE FUTURE, INCLUDING CONDITIONS, IF ANY, UNDER WHICH AN ORAL DEPOSITION COULD BE TAKEN WITH PROPER REGARD TO THE SAFETY AND COMFORT OF DEFENDANT ROSENTHALL. PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND SUBMIT THE PROPOSED ORDER BY E-MAIL TO JAMESHFLEMING@GMAIL.COM WITH A COPY TO THE OPPOSING SIDE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion Fof Quash Of Summons For The Deposition Subpoena Of Alla Boykoff, Md And/Or For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. SUTTON A. SHAPIRO, ESQ. of Wilshire Law Firm (Tel: 213-381-9988) appearing via CourtCall for plaintiffs;
Atty. DALE RATNER, ESQ. of Bishop Barry PC (Tel: 510-596-0888) appearing for defendant Simon Rosenthal.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SIMON ROSENTHALL'S Motion for Quash of Summons for the Deposition Subpoena Of Alla Boykoff, M.D. and/or for a Protective Order.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to quash is denied. The alternative motion for protective order is granted to the following extent: The deposition of Dr. Boykoff will be limited to the following topics: (1) education, training and experience of Dr. Boykoff; (2) health conditions of defendant Rosenthall, if any, relevant to his ability to safely drive a passenger vehicle as of the date of the accident involved in the pending action; and (3) health conditions presently suffered by defendant Rosenthall, if any, which limit or preclude his ability to give an oral deposition now or in the foreseeable future, including conditions, if any, under which an oral deposition could be taken with proper regard to the safety and comfort of defendant Rosenthall.

Plaintiffs' counsel to prepare a proposed order and submit the proposed order by e-mail to jameshfleming@gmail.com with a copy to the opposing side.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO MARTINEZ-VILLANUEVA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES.

No appearances. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion is unopposed and will be granted with sanctions for discovery abuse totaling $500 for this and the two companion motions awarded against defendant Rosenthall and his counsel of record. One order on the three motions is signed. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/JPT)
